subject: Re:
body:
do you have a photo of you in your city, i have no idea what it looks like

I've received the camera today..thank you, very nice of you ..I'm gonna take it with me to record my graduation on 15th.
I didn't graduate yet, still have 2 exams but I'm sure that is gonna be ok. 
Thank you
Andra
